steps.name: source_comparison
steps.acceptance: Source comparison report completed documenting every architectural difference between Apple TarFlow and our model.py, with severity assessment. Zero unresolved differences marked 'unknown impact'.

steps.name: phase2_2d_gaussian
steps.acceptance: Apple TarFlow trained on 2D 8-mode Gaussian mixture. Clean samples matching 8-mode density. Loss curve + sample scatter plot saved.

steps.name: phase2_mnist
steps.acceptance: Apple TarFlow trained on MNIST. bits/dim < 1.5, recognizable digit samples. Loss curve + sample grid saved.

steps.name: phase2_cifar10
steps.acceptance: Apple TarFlow trained on CIFAR-10. bits/dim < 3.5, recognizable image samples. Loss curve + sample grid saved.

steps.name: phase3_step_a_swap_patches
steps.acceptance: Apple architecture adapted: raw (x,y,z) per atom input, per-dimension scale (3 scales per atom), Apple loss (no clamping/reg). Trained on ethanol 5000 steps. Valid_fraction, NLL/dof, log_det/dof reported.

steps.name: phase3_step_b_type_conditioning
steps.acceptance: Atom type embeddings concatenated to position input. 5000 steps on ethanol. Impact on valid_fraction documented.

steps.name: phase3_step_c_variable_size
steps.acceptance: Padding + attention masking for variable atom counts. Ethanol padded to 21 atoms. 5000 steps. Masking impact documented.
steps.notes: Crashed twice due to: (1) T*D vs n_real*D logdet normalization mismatch, (2) padding mask not permuted with PermutationFlip. Fixed in commit 901d6c5. Successfully ran to completion. Key finding: VF collapses from 89% to 2.7% with padding — PRIMARY failure point.

steps.name: phase3_step_d_noise_augmentation
steps.acceptance: Gaussian noise sigma=0.05 on atomic coordinates during training. 5000 steps on ethanol. Impact documented.
steps.notes: Noise augmentation partially recovers VF from 2.7% to 14.3%. But loss is higher than Step C — noise regularizes but degrades NLL.

steps.name: phase3_step_e_shared_scale
steps.acceptance: Per-dimension scale replaced with 1 shared scale (our style). 5000 steps on ethanol. Valid_fraction compared to Step A. KEY TEST: does shared scale cause saturation equilibrium?
steps.notes: SURPRISING RESULT: shared scale IMPROVES VF over per-dim scale (40.2% vs 14.3%). With correct n_real normalization, shared scale does NOT cause saturation exploitation. Hypothesis that shared scale is the primary failure was WRONG.

steps.name: phase3_step_f_stabilization
steps.acceptance: Add asymmetric clamping + log-det regularization. 5000 steps on ethanol. Compare with/without per-dim scale.
steps.notes: CORRECTED: first run (09c565f, wrong normalization) gave VF=0.0. Second run (901d6c5, correct n_real normalization) gives VF=10.4%. Clamping reduces VF from 40.2% (Step E) to 10.4% — significant degradation but not total failure. The clamping limits scale learning but doesn't prevent it entirely with correct normalization.

steps.name: phase4_ablation_matrix
steps.acceptance: Targeted crossing of most impactful factors from Phase 3. ~10-15 configs, 5000 steps each on ethanol. Results table + per-factor effect sizes.

result.primary_finding: Padding is sole failure mechanism — smooth linear decline with pad_fraction

steps.notes: 9 configs: 4 core 2x2x2 crossing (T×noise×scale), 2 padding sweep (T=12,15), 2 augmentation tests (perm, SO3), 1 clamp without padding. Scale type irrelevant at T=9 (<1% diff). Padding causes smooth linear VF decline. Perm aug catastrophically harmful. Clamping only harmful with padding.

steps.name: phase5_best_config_validation
steps.acceptance: Best config from Phase 4 tested on all 8 MD17 molecules. Valid_fraction scaling with molecule size reported. Compared against hyp_003 best (18.3%).

result.ceiling_finding: Architecture achieves 94-100% VF when padding removed

steps.name: phase6_synthesis
steps.acceptance: Final synthesis answering: where does performance degrade, which adaptation matters most, is failure architectural or fundamental, recommended next experiment.

result.architecture_ceiling: 98.2% mean VF across all 8 molecules (no padding)
result.recommended_next: per-molecule TarFlow (T=n_real) for immediate DDPM comparison

steps.name: source_integration
steps.acceptance: Any reusable code (tarflow_apple.py, train_ladder.py) promoted to src/. Experiment directory cleaned.

result.action: N/A — all code already in src/. No .py in experiments/, no __pycache__ tracked. tarflow_apple.py and train_phase*.py remain as diagnostic deliverables.

steps.name: merge_and_tag
steps.acceptance: Branch merged to main, tagged und_001. Docs updated.
